source_pr.title: planner: support window function
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Support the window function in planner. ### What is changed and how it works? Add logical and physical plan operator for window function. It resolves the name in window function before projection, and build the window funtion after processing the having clause. For partition by and order by clause in window functioin, it adds sort operator as it's child. The named window and frame clause will be processed in next PR. ### Check List Tests - Unit test Code changes - Has exported function/method change Side effects - None Related changes - https://github.com/pingcap/parser/pull/76 PTAL @zz-jason @winoros @XuHuaiyu @eurekaka --- This change is [](https://reviewable.io/reviews/pingcap/tidb/8630)

symptoms: sql: "select a, b as z from t order by (sum(z) over())", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select a, b as z from t order by (sum(z) over())", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select a, b as z from t order by (sum(z) over())", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
